ShortDescription.Value: A WriteEverywhere-Module that adds dynamic text to Vodahmins assets

Publish.LongDescription:
# Vodahmin Assets WE integration
Hello and Hallo. This is WriteEverywhere Module that adds dynamic Text to Vodahmins VAG station assets.
### Functions - Works **automaticly**, you don't need any WE knowledge whatsoever! - Dynamic working Bus/Tram Stop Names
---
## Requirements/Supported Assets - [Write Everywhere](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/92908/Windows) – required - [VAG Bus Stop Set](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/132358/Any) - [VAG Tram Stop Set](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/132354/Any) - [VAG Tram Station Loops](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/132668/Any) - [VAG Universal Bus Station](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/132379/Any) - [ESTW Bus Stop Set](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/135663/Any) - [ESTW Tram Stop Set](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/135662/Any)
---
## Check out Vodahmin's assets or my Mods - [Vodahmin von Riſʒ](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/authors/Vodahmin) - [Maestro's Mods](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/authors/UnMaestro)
---
## Credits and Special Thanks - To **Klyte45** for the WriteEverywhere mod.
---
## Enjoy & Share Your Feedback!
Publish.ChangeLog:
## Version 1.1
### Added - VAG Universal Bus Station support - All 3 VAG Tram Station loops support - ESTW Assets support
